name: Sunflower Transportation
recent_news: No public M&A or news found. Minimal web presence (Facebook page only); company describes itself as 'a safe, reliable, clean and sanitized transportation company.' Not to be confused with Sunflower Transportation LLC of Rochester, MN (separate NEMT firm).
fit_notes: Micro-operator (~17 employees, ~$1.3M est. revenue) in Calumet City, south-suburban Chicago. No evidence of school-bus or yellow-bus operations; data flag 'special_needs=1, school=0' plus the broader pattern of similarly-sized peers suggests NEMT/paratransit, not a Summit School Services target. De-prioritize unless verified as SPED school-route contractor.

name: Great Bay Chair Car Svc
recent_news: No public news, website, or M&A activity found. Not listed in KeepNHMoving statewide transportation provider directory excerpt reviewed. Name and 'chair car' descriptor strongly indicate wheelchair-accessible NEMT, consistent with sister CT/NH 'chair car' operators.
fit_notes: Micro NEMT-style operator in Somersworth NH (~20 employees, ~$1.3M est. revenue). 'Chair car' branding and lack of any school-district presence make this a poor fit as a Summit School Services tuck-in; would only be relevant if confirmed to hold SPED home-to-school routes for a NH district.

name: American Chair Car Svc LLC
recent_news: No M&A or sale activity found. Independently operated since founding in 1997 by Luigi Cammarota; remains a small CT-statewide NEMT/chair-car provider with no indication of school-district contracts.
fit_notes: NEMT/wheelchair-only contractor with NPI registration confirming medical-transport focus; no evidence of school or SPED school-route work. Outside Summit's school-bus tuck-in remit. De-prioritize as platform target.

name: Metro West Limousine
recent_news: No public news, website, or M&A activity located. Public-records aggregator ClustrMaps associates Dominic A. Barker with Metro West Limousine; no other digital footprint surfaced.
fit_notes: Micro livery operator (~16 employees, ~$1.2M est. revenue) operating from a residential-style address in Laurel MD. Limo branding + 'special_needs=1' data flag suggests possible adapted-livery/NEMT use, but no school-bus operations evident. Not a fit for Summit tuck-in absent confirmed SPED school routes.

name: Regal Classic Limousines
recent_news: No public news, website, or M&A activity found. Distinct from D.C./N. Virginia 'Regal Limo' (regalsedan.com), NY-based 'Regal Limousine Corp', and NJ-based Regal Luxury Limos. Operates from a residential address in Towson MD.
fit_notes: Micro livery-style operator with no observable school-bus/SPED footprint. Branding ('Classic Limousines') and Towson residential HQ are inconsistent with a yellow-bus contractor profile. Likely outside Summit's tuck-in scope; would require direct confirmation of district SPED contracts to merit further work.
